message.content: I want to work at your company because your focus on scalable cloud solutions aligns with my experience building microservices at my last role, where I optimized latency by 40% for a high-traffic app. I'm drawn to your collaborative culture and innovative projects like the recent AI-driven analytics platform, which would let me contribute to real-world impact while growing my expertise in distributed systems. Joining a mid-sized team like yours offers the perfect balance of autonomy and mentorship, unlike larger firms I've encountered, making it an ideal next step in my career.
